name: @workspace/db
_scripts_doc: push and push-force are intentionally identical: both go through the expect wrapper which always invokes drizzle-kit with --force. This is by design — the wrapper auto-answers drizzle-kit 0.31.x phantom-drift truncate prompts with the safe 'No, do not truncate' option, so --force is non-destructive in practice. push-raw is the only non-force, fully-interactive path; use it for debugging when you want to see and respond to prompts yourself. See lib/db/MIGRATIONS.md.
